prTitle: feat(css): add CSP nonce to hono/css related style and script tags
prBody:
closes #3694 This PR extends upon the work of https://github.com/honojs/hono/pull/2577 with the goal to bring the CSS nonce to the inline `style` and `script` tags created by the usage of `hono/css`. The goal is to be able to add `

Hello!

" Received: "

Hello!

" ❯ src/helper/css/common.case.test.tsx:502:42 500| 501| ) 502| expect(await toString(template)).toBe( | ^ 503| '

Hello!

' 504| ) FAIL src/helper/css/index.test.tsx > CSS Helper > with `html` tag function > Should render CSS styles with `html` tag function and CSP nonce AssertionError: expected '

Hello!

❯ src/helper/css/index.test.tsx:68:40 66| const template = html`${Style({ nonce: '1234' })} 67|

Hello!

` 68| expect(await toString(template)).toBe( | ^ 69| ` 70|

Hello!

` ``` - [ ] Add [TSDoc](https://tsdoc.org/)/[JSDoc](https://jsdoc.app/about-getting-started) to document the code
